app.title: MorphoHDL: A minimalistic language for growing circuits
app.author: jacktang
app.description: A minimalistic language for growing circuits, a new paradigm for building AI models
proposed_tests: Compile morpho code, measure execution time
Grow a simple circuit using morpho, verify functionality
Compare morpho with existing circuit languages, benchmark results

test_results.benchmark_notes:

BENCHMARK:grow_circuit_time_ms:24.37
BENCHMARK:vs_graphcode_nets_ratio:0.43

BENCHMARK:file_count:16
BENCHMARK:loc_count:0
